title: minuartia elegans
intro: Minuartia elegans, also known as the elegant rockjasmine, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Minuartia elegans include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create topical creams and ointments for skin conditions and wounds.
